creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Mar 26 14:13:16 2013
New Revision: 315295
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315295

Log:
  - Update to 3.1.0
  
  PR:		176792
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-lxml/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-lxml/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile	Tue Mar 26 14:12:30 2013	(r315294)
+++ head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile	Tue Mar 26 14:13:16 2013	(r315295)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	lxml
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,9 +17,8 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	xml2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/l
 
 # Python3 ready
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
-PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
-PLIST_SUB=	PORTVERSION=${PORTVERSION}
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTVERSION=${PORTVERSION} PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO=${PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO}
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNAME}

==============================================================================
